name: Zapier Workflows Registry
purpose: Internal registry of planned Zapier workflow automations for the Funding Readiness Scorecard.

boundary.public_safe_summary: Internal routing helpers for funding readiness operations. Use only behind API/server logic.

safety_rules: Do not import this file from browser-facing pages or public widgets.
All names, queues, tags, and workflow references are demo-safe placeholders.
No provider names, provider IDs, affiliate URLs, apply URLs, payout terms, private contacts, borrower PII, credentials, or underwriting notes are included.
Outputs must be treated as readiness routing guidance, not a funding decision, funding offer, or outcome promise.

workflows.label: Scorecard Submission to CRM
workflows.primary_use_case: Create or update an internal lead record after a scorecard submission.
workflows.public_boundary: Never expose private route rules, provider-specific data, credentials, payout terms, or borrower PII in public responses.
implementation_notes: Use environment variables or platform-protected variables at implementation time; do not commit credentials.
Use synthetic test payloads until production integration is authorized.
Keep browser-facing widgets pointed only at public-safe API endpoints.
